summary: Frontend testing of /minted-photos Card View flip functionality. All requested features verified working. Fixed bug where flip-back button was opening lightbox instead of flipping card back.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/photo/UnifiedPhotoCard.jsx - Added flip-back-btn check to handleClick, added isFlipped check to prevent lightbox when card is flipped, added useEffect to sync flipped prop with internal state
/app/frontend/src/pages/MintedPhotos.jsx - Added flipped prop to UnifiedPhotoCard to sync with flippedCardId state
context_for_next_testing_agent: All card flip features verified working. Flip button flips card in place, flip-back button returns to front, backdrop click also unflips card. Nav bar hides when card is flipped and returns when unflipped.

grid_view_hidden.details: Grid View and List View buttons are completely hidden from UI. Only Card View button (LayoutGrid icon) is visible.

card_view_default.details: viewMode defaults to 'card', 12 photo cards displayed on page load.

flip_button_flips_in_place.details: Clicking 'Tap to flip' button flips card in place (data-flipped='true'). Lightbox does NOT open.

flipped_card_back_content.details: Back side shows: Base Value, XP bar with percentage, Total Dollar Value, Authenticity section, Photo Stats & Bonuses (Stars, Level, Age, Reactions, BL Coins, Seniority), Scenery type, Streaks, and 'Tap to flip back' button.

nav_bar_hides_when_flipped.details: Nav bar is hidden when card is flipped (NavContext.setHideNav(true) called via flippedCardId state).

other_cards_dimmed.details: 11 out of 12 cards have opacity: 0.3 and pointer-events: none when one card is flipped.

z_index_100_flipped.details: Flipped card gets z-index: 100 to appear above all other cards.

backdrop_overlay.details: Dark overlay (bg-black/60 z-40) appears when card is flipped. Clicking backdrop unflips the card.

flip_back_button_works.details: Clicking 'Tap to flip back' button returns card to front view (data-flipped='false'). Lightbox does NOT open.

nav_bar_returns_after_unflip.details: Nav bar returns to visible state when card is unflipped (either via flip-back button or backdrop click).

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.bug: Flip-back button was opening lightbox instead of flipping card back
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.root_cause: handleClick function only checked for flip-card-btn but not flip-back-btn. Also, clicking anywhere on flipped card (back side) was triggering lightbox.
fix_applied: Added isFlipped check to handleClick: if (isFlipped) return; - prevents lightbox when card is flipped
Added useEffect to sync flipped prop with internal isFlipped state for external control (backdrop click)
Added flipped={flippedCardId === photo.mint_id} prop to UnifiedPhotoCard in MintedPhotos.jsx
